name: send-to-gemini
description: Send selected text to Google Gemini via context menu, or clip page sections as Markdown

scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && cmd /c npx esbuild src/background.ts src/content.ts src/clipper_content.ts src/options.ts --bundle --outdir=dist --platform=browser --target=chrome120 --external:chrome && cmd /c "copy static\* dist\"
